acceptance_criteria.text: Runtime PostgreSQL compatibility improved without broad rewrite.
proof: DB cursor wrapper adapts legacy ? placeholders through QueryAdapter.
HybridRow supports dict(row), key access, and positional access.
INSERT OR REPLACE runtime occurrences in src/main.py were removed.
gaps: Legacy ? SQL remains in source and is handled at the cursor boundary.

proof: Selected traceback/session payload debug prints removed.
gaps: Additional non-auth debug prints remain for future cleanup.

proof: No global default API limit is configured.
GigaChat request paths use verify_tls instead of hard-coded verify=False.

acceptance_criteria.text: External auth encryption fails closed in production.
proof: auth_encryption raises without EXTERNAL_AUTH_SECRET_KEY when production env is detected.

gaps: Full TypeScript warning cleanup remains a larger follow-up.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_query_adapter.py tests/test_parsed_payload_validation.py tests/test_auth_email_case_insensitive.py tests/test_checkout_payment_providers.py tests/test_crypto_pay_client.py tests/test_map_url_normalizer.py tests/test_review_response_utils.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_finance_kpis.py
known_gaps: Full pytest/testcontainers gate was not run.
Full src/main.py decomposition remains a larger P2 follow-up.
